topics.title: Comedy News and Caller Interactions
topics.summary: The studio discusses the passing of comedian Richard Jennings, the complexities of acting in films, and a bizarre phone call from a man with a pet-related nickname before transitioning to upcoming guests and pop culture topics.

topics.title: Sci-Fi Comparisons and Online Identities
topics.summary: The studio explores the hypothetical conflict between Star Trek and Battlestar Galactica while discussing a guest's online persona as "Daba" and the complexities of internet copyright.

topics.title: Mock Mafia Hit Request
topics.summary: The studio reacts to a recorded message from a caller who used mob-style language to request that a former classmate be 'taken care of' and made to look like a suicide.

topics.title: Eric the Midget and Mob Persona
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where Eric the Midget discusses his persona, interactions with other callers regarding hit orders, and a humorous exchange involving a publicist's call.

topics.title: Weight Loss Contest Weigh-ins
topics.summary: The studio hosts a weight loss competition called Battle of the Blobs where staff members weigh in to compete for a twenty-thousand-dollar prize.

topics.title: Weight Loss Contest and Roseanne Barr Interview
topics.summary: The show features staff members weighing in for a weight loss competition before transitioning to an interview with Roseanne Barr regarding her health, career, and past marriage.

topics.title: Roseanne Barr's Experience with Fame and Meditation
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding Roseanne Barr's personal journey through mental health challenges, her transition into meditation, and her reflections on the impact of fame and public life.

topics.title: Roseanne Discusses Career, Wealth, and Social Issues
topics.summary: The studio features Roseanne sharing her journey from stand-up comedy to television stardom while discussing personal experiences with family, the ethics of wealth and charity, and her upcoming performances.

topics.title: Celebrity Interviews and News Reports
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including a discussion on Rosanne's career and retirement plans, an analysis of Ron Artest's public apology, a report on a woman with chronic hiccups, and an interview with a woman living with schizoaffective bipolar disorder.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Substance Use
topics.summary: The studio explores the personal lives of a couple, discussing their history with mental illness, past drug use, and current relationship status.

topics.title: Drug Use and Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores the impact of substance use on personal relationships, including discussions regarding past sexual encounters, lack of jealousy in a long-term partnership, and the influence of narcotics on social behavior.

topics.title: Comedy Career Trends and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features guests Doug and Bingo discussing the professionalization of comedy, personal anecdotes regarding substance use in the industry, and upcoming performances at the Gotham Comedy Club.

topics.title: John Popper Arrest and Satellite Radio Merger
topics.summary: The studio discusses the arrest of musician John Popper for reckless driving with a cache of weapons, the potential monopoly risks of a satellite radio merger, and upcoming segments featuring Roseanne Barr and various celebrity updates.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Recent Deaths
topics.summary: The studio discusses the death of Boston singer Brad Delp, the suicide of comedian Richard Jenny, and a skiing incident involving actors Chad Lowe, Rob Morrow, and Fisher Stevens.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the auction of a massage table linked to Ted Haggard, President Bush's visit to Colombia, political updates on Newt Gingrich and Fred Thompson, reports on FBI surveillance, the film 300, celebrity news regarding Brad Pitt and Courtney Love, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
